tools_used: CourtListener MCP opinion search and endpoint access
direct retrieval of the Supreme Court petition linked in the snapshot
helpful: The snapshot identified the extraordinary-writ posture and linked the petition
The petition text exposed the exact mandate argument and lower-court chronology
CourtListener supplied the prior Supreme Court and Fifth Circuit opinions
gaps: The petition text was not provisioned under record/documents even though the snapshot contained a working filing link
The statpack does not provide a separate base rate for Supreme Court original or extraordinary-writ petitions
notes: Ordinary cert base rates were used only as an upper-level calibration reference because Rule 20 mandamus is a distinct and substantially rarer posture.
